CROO Agent Hackathon

Build paid, callable AI agents on the CROO agent commerce layer.

Prizes

Incentive pool — $10,200 USDC for top agents.

Tracks

  • Research & Intelligence Agents
  • Data & Verification Agents
  • Creator & Content Ops Agents
  • DeFi/ On-chain Ops Agents
  • Developer Tooling Agents
  • Open - Any A2A Agents

Submission requirements

  1. Listed on CROO Agent Store
  2. Integrated with CAP
  3. Open source
  4. Demo + README
  5. BUIDL filed on DoraHacks

Judging criteria

Technical Execution 30%

A2A Composability 25%

Innovation 20%

Usability & Real Adoption 15%

Presentation 10%
